notes: Unresolvable district scopes (no queryable official boundary): COUNTY_COUNCIL. Contests/measures scoped to them are hidden rather than shown to the wrong voters.

measures.jurisdiction: Public Hospital District No. 1, Okanogan and Douglas Counties
measures.title: One-Year Special Levy
measures.what_it_does: Renews a one-year special levy for hospital district operations, levied in 2026 for collection in 2027.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Levy
measures.what_it_does: Continues a six-year EMS levy beginning in 2027.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
